name: Automated Helpdesk Ticket Alerts to Microsoft Teams from Easy8

parameters.content:
## Call for issues in Easy8 & send relevant information to MS teams channel
**1) GET requested ticket by ID via "Easy8 node"**
**2) "Edit fields" - keep relevant data** such as description and created URL 
**3) "AI Agent" - use AI Agent to summarize request ticket according description and to suggest a solution**
**4) Send the message via "MS Teams node"** - use technical user & select relevant teams channel or chat

## Final Output:

### ❗️New ticket was created:

**Subject:** Export to PDF is not working
**Ticket ID:** [1354](https://www.easy8.com)
**Priority**: High 
**AI Summary:**

Main issue:
User cannot export reports to PDF format. When attempting export, the system either shows a blank page or downloads an incomplete file.

Priority of the issue:
Medium priority – while not blocking all work, it affects key reporting functionality and could impact scheduled client deliveries.

Recommended possible solution:
As an IT expert, I recommend the following steps:

Verify that the PDF generation service is running and accessible from the application.

Check for recent changes in report templates that might cause rendering issues.

Review application and server logs for error messages during the export process.

Test PDF export with smaller datasets to see if file size or complexity is causing failures.

Ensure the PDF library or export plugin is up to date and compatible with the current application version.

If the issue persists, provide users with an alternative export format (e.g., Excel) until resolved.Main issue:
User cannot export reports to PDF format. When attempting export, the system either shows a blank page or downloads an incomplete file.

Priority of the issue:
Medium priority – while not blocking all work, it affects key reporting functionality and could impact scheduled client deliveries.

Recommended possible solution:
As an IT expert, I recommend the following steps:

Verify that the PDF generation service is running and accessible from the application.

Check for recent changes in report templates that might cause rendering issues.

Review application and server logs for error messages during the export process.

Test PDF export with smaller datasets to see if file size or complexity is causing failures.

Ensure the PDF library or export plugin is up to date and compatible with the current application version.

If the issue persists, provide users with an alternative export format (e.g., Excel) until resolved.

## Helpdesk Ticket Notification to MS Teams 
**Try out using a native Easy8 node to get new requested ticket according saved filter and send them to your MS Teams Channel.**

### About Workflow
This workflow sends a message to a Microsoft Teams channel when a new helpdesk ticket is created in Easy8. It’s a simple alternative or addition to traditional email notifications.

### Use Case 
Any team working with Help Desk tickets in Easy8 can benefit from automatic summary send to Teams channel - making sure all tickets are addressed in time & no more searching and checking filters.


### How it works
- Set webhook will ensure the automatic run whenever a new ticket request is created
=> Webhook type POST
=> Insert n8n webhook URL to your active Easy8 Webhook 
- Easy8 node will GET a new ticket request whenever it is created in the system, this is ensure by saved filter
=> Issues | Get One | Issue ID
- Edit fields - description for AI agent and creation of field URL to your application URL/issues/{{ $json.issue.id }} 
- AI Agent summarize description
- Send to MS Teams - by native MS Teams node
=> Chat Message | Create | Selected Channel | HTML content
=> HTML content mapped from edit fields node

### How to use
- Adjust the set-up to your team's need
- Use the workflow for multiple teams
- Map incoming query parameters (e.g. title, priority, description) in the workflow.
- Customize the MS Teams message layout for clarity

### Requirements 
- Easy8 application
=> ideally technical user for API calls with specific permissions
- MS Teams
=> ideally technical user for API calls with specific permissions

### Need Help? 
- Reach out through n8n community => https://community.n8n.io/u/easy8
- Contact our team directly => https://www.easy8.com/ai-agency
- Visit our youtube channel => https://www.youtube.com/@Easy8Group

nodes.name: MS Teams message to Support channel
Catch Easy Webhook - New Issue Created
Pick Description & Create URL to issue

options.systemMessage:
=You are a helpful assistant who summarize read descriptions of the task provided and created summary of the task description in form:
Main issue: 
Priority of the issue:
Recommend possible solution:
When answering the "recommended possible solution" act as an IT expert.

Return response in HTML structure.
